nasb.text: ‘Who is this that grows like the dawn, As beautiful as the full moon, As pure as the sun, As awesome as an army with banners?’

esv.text: “Who is this who looks down like the dawn, beautiful as the moon, bright as the sun, awesome as an army with banners?”

cnv.text: “那出現如破曉的晨光， 美麗如月亮， 燦爛如日頭， 威武有如展開旗幟的軍隊的是誰呢？”

ccb.text: “这位灿烂似晨光， 皎洁如明月，耀眼如太阳， 亮丽如布满天际之星辰的是谁呢？”
